name: G-5 aggregator: every aggregation emits a sha256:<hex> tree hash so the lock file can pin it
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
' > tree/google/g.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>err.txt; grep -qE '"tree_hash":"sha256:[a-f0-9]+"' err.txt && echo tree_hashed 1>&2
